title: Fixed Platform Puzzle
short_description: Move colored blocks off the grid. Wrong order = dead-end. Pure logic, no time pressure.
long_description:
Test your logic skills in this strategic puzzle game. Arrange and remove blocks from the grid in the correct order. One wrong move can trap you - plan carefully!

Features:
- 50 progressively harder levels
- No time pressure - puzzle at your own pace
- Satisfying removal mechanics with ASMR sounds
- Play on mobile, tablet, or desktop
- Save progress automatically

Perfect for casual puzzle fans.

controls.mouse: Click and drag blocks toward an edge to remove them
controls.touch: Tap and swipe blocks toward an edge to remove them
